ModMetaData.name: BondageBedTorture Furniture Addon 1.4 - Retexture and More
ModMetaData.author: Mr. Mauer, Gerrymon96
ModMetaData.description:
This is the 1.4 compatibility update for the BondageBed Torture - Furniture Addon by Mr. Mauer, originally for my personal use so I took some liberty to change the textures and items. The mod run MOSTLY fine even with red errors here and there. I'll do my best if there's any bug/glitch, but since my modding knowledge only consist of copy-pasting XMLs, I can't promise everything will be solved in timely manner (or ever)... so I apologize in advance. Please, always backup your saves in-case mods go wrong.
Change notes (version 0): - untouched from the original: prisoner pole, operating table and beheading block. - Pillory texture replaced. - TrueCross texture replaced, name changed into Binding Cross. - TortureCross texture replaced, name changed into Saltire Cross. - New description for most of the furnitures. - replace all of Hanging Cage L with new Round Cage. - replace all of Hanging Cage R with new Bar Cage. - all bondage furnitures now have comfort of 0.09, making bound prisoners eventually uncomfortable. - all bondage furnitures now have terror value between 30-40 for those that have ideology.
Known errors: - Weird graphical stacking because of how the game render things. - Cannot put bondage furnitures outdoor, will fails to bind prisoner. Inherent issue from Bondage Bed mod. - Some prisoner sometimes produces error "Tried to get sleeping slot pos with index 1, but there are only 1 sleeping slots available.". Need more checking. - Since these basically are glorified sleeping spots, some furnitures like pillory are rendered on where the pawn usually sleeps, so any re-tex/animation/races mods that changed pawn's size will probably look weird. - For whatever reasons, if the bound prisoner fell off the furniture and was brought back to their prisoner bed, right click their bondage furniture to remove the "bound" status.
Credits: - BondageBedTorture Furniture Addon 1.3 by Mr.Mauer (https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2109234248) - Some art inspiration from the leftover/unused graphic data inside COF's Execute Expand (https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2869133661)
